name: read_file
description: Read the full contents of a file at a given path. Returns the file content as a string. Handles text files of any format (code, markdown, JSON, YAML, etc.).

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to read.

encoding.description: File encoding to use when reading. Defaults to 'utf-8'.

start_line.description: Optional 1-based line number to start reading from. If omitted, reads from the beginning.

end_line.description: Optional 1-based line number to stop reading at (inclusive). If omitted, reads to end of file.
